dismissalComment.html: Shreyas with the catch on the straight boundary! Inglis tees off down the ground, clubbing a length ball from wide outside off back over the bowler's head. Shreyas has placed himself rather straight on the long-on boundary and he runs to his left to take the catch

dismissalText.commentary: Ayush Badoni st †Prabhsimran Singh b Chahal 43 (18b 5x4 3x6 19m) SR: 238.88

dismissalComment.html: Prabhsimran is interested in the stumping/caught behind after he whips off the bails ... Badoni tried to cut a quick one from Chahal outside off but was beaten, that really zipped through outside off with good bounce ... no edge, but  what do we have here? Has Badoni lifted his back foot off the ground? He has! And Prabhsimran has broken the stumps at that very millisecond. What a soft end to a fiery innings, he simply lifted his foot off the ground for no apparent reason and Prabhsimran was ready to pounce on the error.

images.longCaption: Ayush Badoni was stumped by Prabhsimran Singh, Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings, Lucknow, IPL 2026, May 23, 2026

dismissalText.commentary: Ayush Badoni st †Prabhsimran Singh b Chahal 43 (18b 5x4 3x6 19m) SR: 238.88

dismissalComment.html: Prabhsimran is interested in the stumping/caught behind after he whips off the bails ... Badoni tried to cut a quick one from Chahal outside off but was beaten, that really zipped through outside off with good bounce ... no edge, but  what do we have here? Has Badoni lifted his back foot off the ground? He has! And Prabhsimran has broken the stumps at that very millisecond. What a soft end to a fiery innings, he simply lifted his foot off the ground for no apparent reason and Prabhsimran was ready to pounce on the error.
